name: Zucchini-Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and cook for about 10 minutes until softened.
2. Stir in parsley, garlic, basil, and bay leaf. Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add zucchini and simmer for another 5 minutes, stirring often.
4. Stir in ground beef and cook until browned and separated, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Return the bay leaf to the skillet and stir into the meat mixture.
6. Serve hot over pasta, potatoes, rice, or even a bun, topped with Parmesan cheese.
